title: Myrtus ophiticola
taxonomy: Myrtus ophiticola is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. It is native to the Mediterranean region and belongs to the genus Myrtus. Within the family Myrtaceae, Myrtus ophiticola is classified as a member of the order Myrtales. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, such as its leaves and flowers. Myrtus ophiticola is often used in horticulture for its attractive foliage and fragrant flowers.
